caption: Figure 3: Frequency of viewing extremist social media inciting violence toward women and girls
description: A grouped bar chart comparing the frequency (Often, Sometimes, Rarely, Never) of viewing extremist social media inciting violence toward women and girls between Male (blue) and Female (red) respondents. The chart shows that females report seeing this content 'Often' at a much higher rate (35.7%) than males (7.7%), while males report seeing it 'Sometimes' at a higher rate (53.9%) than females (30.4%).
A pull quote highlighted with large cyan double-quotation marks, containing a testimonial about the public humiliation of women labeled as part of the LGBTQ+ community.
